creator: paul@trpz.com
text:
Up through 6.2 the system (a dell laptop latitude c540) with a dlink
airplus G dwlg630 (h/w ver c2, f/w ver 3.0) worked fine.  I updated to
7.0 (currently 7.0 Beta 4) and immediately when inserting the card the
system will report an interrupt storm at irq11 and provides no connectivity.

Information:

ifconfig ath0
ath0: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
        ether 00:11:95:7b:2a:58
        inet 0.0.0.0 netmask 0xff000000 broadcast 255.255.255.255
        media: IEEE 802.11 Wireless Ethernet autoselect (autoselect)
        status: no carrier
        ssid "" channel 10 (2457 Mhz 11g)
        authmode WPA1+WPA2/802.11i privacy ON deftxkey UNDEF txpower 31.5
        bmiss 7 scanvalid 60 bgscan bgscanintvl 300 bgscanidle 250
        roam:rssi11g 7 roam:rate11g 5 protmode CTS burst roaming MANUAL
        bintval 0

pciconf -lv

ath0@pci0:5:0:0:        class=0x020000 card=0x3b081186 chip=0x001a168c rev=0x01 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Atheros Communications Inc.'
    device     = 'Atheros AR5005G Atheros AR5005G 802.11abg NIC Chipset / TP-Link (TL-WN551G)'
    class      = network
    subclass   = ethernet
